section_name: Cooperation with Other Entities in Aeronautic Development
text:
The department and the director may:

(1) cooperate with or assist the United States, a governmental subdivision of this state, or a person engaged in aeronautics or in the development of aeronautics; and

(2) coordinate the aeronautical activities of entities described by Subdivision (1).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.052 — Cooperation with Other Entities in Aeronautic Development

The department and the director may:

    (1) cooperate with or assist the United States, a governmental subdivision of this state, or a person engaged in aeronautics or in the development of aeronautics; and

    (2) coordinate the aeronautical activities of entities described by Subdivision (1).

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department and the director may:
cooperate with or assist the United States, a governmental subdivision of this state, or a person engaged in aeronautics or in the development of aeronautics; and
coordinate the aeronautical activities of entities described by Subdivision (1).

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
